response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and cross-platform experience, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ development experience in industrial automation, high-performance systems, or secure engineering contexts required for the role; C++ appears only in early career academic/thesis work with no recent or professional application, and core competencies like STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial protocols are absent from the resume.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with diverse tech exposure
Proven experience in event-driven architectures and open-source contributions
Excellent communication and mentoring skills evidenced by workshops and talks
concerns: No recent or professional C++ development experience in the last 9+ years
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), MQTT, or industrial protocols
No evidence of designing scalable on-prem/cloud systems using C++/STL or multi-threaded networking
